{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/nautilus/ingit-cowork-en/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "ingit-cowork-en"
tags:
  * nautilus
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. ingit-cowork-en

_Файлов:_ 10

h2. Содержание

* [[01-cowork-discovery|01-cowork-discovery.md]] — 
* [[02-cowork-provides|02-cowork-provides.md]] — 
* [[03-ingit-provides|03-ingit-provides.md]] — 
* [[04-symbiotic-architecture|04-symbiotic-architecture.md]] — 
* [[05-four-integration-paths|05-four-integration-paths.md]] — 
* [[06-refined-ingit-scope|06-refined-ingit-scope.md]] — 
* [[07-practical-first-steps|07-practical-first-steps.md]] — 
* [[08-implications-nautilus-okwf|08-implications-nautilus-okwf.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[09-risks-open-questions|09-risks-open-questions.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[10-strategic-positioning|10-strategic-positioning.md]] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[308-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.36)
* [[308-table-of-contents]] (сходство 0.31)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.19)
